title: potentilla argentea f. tenuiloba
intro: Potentilla argentea f. tenuiloba, also known as Silver Cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species that is a variety of Potentilla argentea. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function.
